title: Pre-Lit Decorated Artificial Christmas Wreath Green Branches With Pine Cones Holly Berries & Warm White LED Lights Indoor/Outdoor Xmas Decoration 20"
features: Mixed green foilage decorated with berries, pinecones & holly leaves
Waterproof battery pack with timer function: 6 hours on / 18 hours off
description: Welcome visitors to your home this Christmas time with one of our decorated pre-lit wreaths.The wreath features 80 tips with artificial pine-like branches that have been covered in extra festive decorations including red berries, pinecones and holly leaves. The wreath has been finished with 20 warm white static effect LED lights.The wreath includes an attached waterproof control box for the LED lights. The lights on this wreath can be set on a timer. Push the button on the battery pack once to switch the lights on for 8 hours. After 8 hours have passed, they'll automatically switch off for 18 hours. And then on again for another 8 hours. Perfect for setting it to come on just as you sit down with your family.Each wreath has a diameter of approximately 50cm and is 13cm deep making it the perfect size to hang on your porch door to welcome any guests over the Christmas period.
